tools.name: search-vendors
tools.description: Browse and search wedding vendor listings on Zola by type, location, price, and style. Returns vendor profiles with photos, ratings, and pricing. Supports venues, photographers, videographers, florists, musicians/DJs, hair & makeup, caterers, cakes/desserts, planners, bar services, officiants, and extras. Only call this tool if the user is looking to find or compare specific vendors, not for general wedding planning advice.

tools.name: get-vendor-details
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific wedding vendor on Zola including pricing, packages, FAQs, reviews, and more. Use the vendor slug from search results.
